name: The Golf Loft
address: 125 Tumwater Blvd SE Suite D121, Tumwater, WA 98501
about: The Golf Loft is an indoor golf training facility located in Tumwater, WA, offering high-tech simulators, professional coaching, and club fitting services. The venue provides a realistic, year-round golf experience through its advanced simulator technology, making it suitable for practice, full rounds, and lessons. Pricing options include hourly rentals, punch cards, and memberships, catering to both casual players and serious golfers looking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: High-tech GC Hawk and GC3 simulators for a realistic golf experience
PGA Professional coaching available with OnForm video review and launch monitor feedback
Year-round indoor facility perfect for rainy-day practice or group activities
Comprehensive options including memberships, punch cards, and hourly rentals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers club rentals, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the exact time for 18 holes, but it mentions 45-minute private lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf Loft offers junior programs and is suitable for children's golf lessons and practice.
